data.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Ceases Substantial Holding in Charter Hall
data.description:
Charter Hall Group ( (AU:CHC) ) has provided an update.

Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc. has ceased to be a substantial holder in Charter Hall Group, as indicated in a recent notice. This change in substantial holding may impact Charter Hall Group’s shareholder structure and could have implications for its market positioning and stakeholder relationships.

More about Charter Hall Group

Charter Hall Group is a leading property investment and management company in Australia, specializing in real estate funds management. The company focuses on providing property solutions across various sectors including office, retail, industrial, and logistics, catering to a diverse range of investors.

data.title: CMB.TECH Bermuda Increases Stake in Golden Ocean Group
data.description:
Golden Ocean Group ( (GOGL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

CMB.TECH Bermuda Ltd., a subsidiary of CMB.TECH NV, has acquired 4,606,390 shares in Golden Ocean Group Limited for approximately USD 37.5 million. This acquisition increases CMB.TECH Bermuda’s ownership to 48.9% of Golden Ocean’s issued share capital and 49.4% of the outstanding shares with voting rights, potentially strengthening its influence within the company.

data.title: Yojee Ltd. Announces New Securities Issuance on ASX
data.description:
The latest update is out from Yojee Ltd. ( (AU:YOJ) ).

Yojee Ltd. has announced the issuance of 6,024,649 fully paid ordinary securities, which will be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX). This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its capital structure and potentially improve its market position. The issuance of these securities could have implications for the company’s financial flexibility and stakeholder interests, as it may influence investor perceptions and the company’s future growth opportunities.

More about Yojee Ltd.

Yojee Ltd. operates in the logistics and supply chain industry, providing digital solutions to enhance the efficiency and transparency of logistics operations. The company focuses on leveraging technology to streamline supply chain processes and improve the overall logistics experience for businesses.

data.title: Gorilla Gold Mines Updates on Mulwarrie Drilling Project
data.description:
Labyrinth Resources Limited ( (AU:GG8) ) has issued an announcement.

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd has provided an update on its Mulwarrie Drilling Project, highlighting the presence of quartz veining with associated sulphides in one of its drill holes, MWEX012. While assay results are pending, the company cautions against using visual estimates as a substitute for laboratory analyses, emphasizing the importance of accurate data for economic evaluations. The announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and adherence to industry standards, as it awaits further data to inform its exploration strategy.

More about Labyrinth Resources Limited

Gorilla Gold Mines Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of gold resources. The company is involved in projects that aim to discover and extract gold deposits, with a market focus on enhancing its resource base and increasing its production capabilities.

data.description:
StrongPoint ASA ( (DE:PGT) ) has provided an update.

StrongPoint ASA has announced the call for its 2025 Annual General Meeting, which will be held as an audiocast on April 29. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s future plans and operational strategies, reinforcing StrongPoint’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.

More about StrongPoint ASA

The company operates in over 20 countries, offering end-to-end e-commerce solutions and a range of in-store technologies. StrongPoint is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and has a revenue of approximately NOK 1.3 billion.

data.title: Yaskawa Electric Reports Mixed Financial Results for FY 2025
data.description:
An announcement from Yaskawa Electric ( (JP:6506) ) is now available.

Yaskawa Electric reported a decrease in revenue and operating profit for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2025, with revenue down by 6.6% and operating profit dropping by 24.3%. Despite these declines, the company saw an increase in profit before tax and profit attributable to owners of the parent, indicating some resilience in its financial performance. Looking ahead, Yaskawa plans to increase revenue and operating profit in the next fiscal year by capitalizing on recovering market demand and optimizing production and sales. However, a decrease in profit before tax and earnings per share is expected due to the absence of previous gains from share transfers.

More about Yaskawa Electric

Yaskawa Electric Corporation is a prominent player in the industrial automation industry, specializing in the production of motion control systems, robotics, and system engineering. The company is listed on the Tokyo and Fukuoka stock exchanges and is known for its innovative solutions in automation technology.

YTD Price Performance: -6.97%

data.title: State Street Corporation Becomes Substantial Holder in Collins Foods
data.description:
Collins Foods Limited ( (AU:CKF) ) has issued an announcement.

Collins Foods Limited has announced a significant change in its shareholder structure, with State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries becoming substantial holders. This development reflects a shift in the voting power dynamics within the company, as State Street now has the power to control the exercise of voting rights attached to a significant number of shares. This change could potentially influence the company’s strategic decisions and impact its operations, given State Street’s role as an investment manager and trustee.

More about Collins Foods Limited
